name: File Explorer sidebar shows files and allows opening
description: When the user is on the editor tab, a file explorer sidebar is visible showing default files (index.html, style.css, app.js). Clicking a file opens it in a new editor tab.

planSteps.description: Verify a file explorer sidebar is visible on the right side of the editor
Verify the sidebar shows at least three default files: index.html, style.css, and app.js
Click on the file named style.css in the file explorer sidebar
Verify a new editor tab appears at the top showing style.css
Verify the editor content changes to show CSS code with syntax highlighting
Click on the file named app.js in the file explorer sidebar
Verify another editor tab appears showing app.js and the editor content changes to JavaScript code
